channel.title: XTS on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in XTS on BurningXFlame

item.title: Intro
item.description: XTS - Secure and Adaptive Cross-Region Transmission for Cloud XTS is a Cloud-Native Cross-Region Transmission Service which improves the security of Cross-Region Transmission,

item.title: Use
item.description: Define a Region CR apiVersion: ext.burningxflame.github.com/v1 kind: Region metadata: namespace: <ns> name: <name> spec: # the internal port of XTS for the destination region internalPort: <port> # the external (i.

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Feature List Category Feature Function Cross-Region Transmission Function Multiple Regions Security Secure Tunnels Security Minimize Attack Surface Security Reject Connections From the Public Internet Security Protect Services From Being Exposed to the Public Internet Security Defend Against DDoS Attacks Security Defend Against Slow Attacks Security Close Idle Connections Scalability Vertical Scaling Scalability Horizontal Scaling Reliability Truly-Distributed Reliability Load-Balancing Reliability Established Connections Remain Intact on Config Changes Reliability Zero Downtime During Scaling Out/In Reliability Zero Downtime During Upgrade Reliability Zero Downtime on Temporary Errors Reliability Zero Downtime on Process Crash Logging High-Performant Logging and Log Rotation Deployment Docker Image and Helm Chart Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade to a New Version Add-On List Add-On Feature ATC Adaptive Hierarchical Transmission Control Pricing and Licensing XTS XTS Add-On License Commercial License Commercial Add-On License Features Learn More → Learn More → Support Email Email Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:

item.title: Features
item.description: Function Cross-Region Transmission XTS establishes secure tunnels between regions, and enables cross-region transmission. Multiple Regions XTS supports multiple regions. You may define as many regions as you like.

item.title: Add-Ons
item.description: Add-On Feature ATC Adaptive Hierarchical Transmission Control ATC - Adaptive Hierarchical Transmission Control XTS can adapt to real-time traffic, and ensure priority guarantee, maximum bandwidth utilization, and fairness at the same time.

item.title: RESTful
item.description: Create/Update a Region Request Method: PUT URL: https://<host:port>/regions/<namespace>/<name> Header: Content-Type: application/json Body: { "internalPort": <port>, "externalAddr": "<host>:<port>" } View Use → for detailed description of each field.
